shortForecast: Patchy Drizzle then Scattered Rain Showers
name: Tonight
detailedForecast: Patchy drizzle between 9pm and 2am, then scattered rain showers. Cloudy, with a low around 37. East wind 5 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
